title: Carrier Trade Order Volume
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS orders FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT Commodity AS label, SUM(Quantity) AS value FROM CarrierTradeOrder WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY Commodity ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {orders} carrier trade order(s) posted during the report period. Running carrier trade orders turns your fleet carrier into a trading post — regularly posting orders builds a steady flow of autonomous commerce across the galaxy.
details.help: CarrierTradeOrder fires when a trade order is created. Quantity and Commodity define the volume. orders is the primary metric.

tagLines: Carrier trade order activity logged. Your fleet carrier's commercial ledger has been updated.
A floating market that follows you everywhere. The margins don't always follow, but the commodities do.
The galaxy's traders will fill your carrier holds if the price is right. Sometimes it is.
